title: Sudan: ‘El Obeid must not become the next crime scene’ warn UN investigators
content: Atrocities committed by the Rapid Support Forces (RSF) militia against Sudanese civilians in El Fasher in October – including mass killings, abductions and gang rapes – bear the markers of genocide, independent UN human rights investigators reported on Wednesday.

sourceTitle: UN News - Global perspective Human stories | Peace and Security

title: UN maritime agency seeks release of 44 detained seafarers as food runs low
content: The UN’s International Maritime Organization (IMO) appealed on Monday for the urgent release of 44 seafarers held captive in Somali waters by pirates and armed robbers.
snippet: The UN’s International Maritime Organization (IMO) appealed on Monday for the urgent release of 44 seafarers held captive in Somali waters by pirates and armed robbers.
sourceTitle: UN News - Global perspective Human stories | Peace and Security

title: Strait of Hormuz: UN agencies call for diplomacy to end attacks
content: As both Washington and Tehran claim to control the critical commercial shipping route through the narrow Strait of Hormuz, UN agencies on Monday are calling for de-escalation amid the recent spike in strikes in the region related to the US-Iran war.

title: Security Council LIVE: Top UN officials call for de-escalation in Yemen
content: As the UN chief’s Special Envoy for Yemen, Hans Grundberg, calls for swift de-escalation following reports of Saudi Arabian airstrikes and Iranian aircraft landing in the country, the Security Council’s emergency meeting at 3pm (local time) on Monday will be briefed by top officials on the latest humanitarian and political situation. Stay tuned for live updates.

sourceTitle: UN News - Global perspective Human stories | Peace and Security

title: UN envoy urges parties to ‘stay the course’ towards peace in eastern DR Congo
content: The new head of the UN mission in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) has urged parties to the peace processes for the volatile eastern region to maintain momentum and fully implement their commitments.
